message:
fix: address lint issues and improve various components

app/_offline/page.tsx:
- Add "use client" directive for onClick handler
- Remove unused Link import
- Escape apostrophe in text content

Various component improvements from code review:
- Simplified styling and structure in multiple components
- Improved error handling and edge cases
- Fixed minor issues across contact page, loading state, and others

All changes pass lint and type checks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
